title: Huawei S220S-10PN4JX GIgabit PoE Switch, 2x 2.5G POE, 2x 2.5SFP, 2x SFP+
description: Huawei S220S-10PN4JX is a manageable L2 switch equipped with 6x 1Gbit ethernet with PoE+ support, 2x 1Gbit ethernet, 2x 2.5G ethernet with PoE+ support, 2x 2.5G SFP a 2x SFP+ ports . The total PoE budget is 128W , ensuring reliable power for 8 devices under the 802.3af standard or 4 devices under the 802.3at standard. It supports all common L2 features and extensive management options, including management via the Huawei eKit App , enabling cloud management. With the Huawei Online Upgrade… The Huawei eKitEngine S220S series switches are L2 GE/10GE switches designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Advanced features, high reliability, comprehensive device management options, rack-mount capability, built-in 230V AC power supply, and fanless design (only non-PoE models) make them suitable for a wide range of installation scenarios Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (4) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps + (2) 1G/2.5Gbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/2.5G + (2) 1/10G Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 128 Max. power consumption [W] 162 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 320 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 210 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 76 MAC address table 16000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 57
